title: nephrodium × slossoniae
intro: Nephrodium × slossoniae, also known as Slosson's fern, is a rare and sterile hybrid fern species that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Nephrodium × slossoniae include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
